baseline.notes: Run #9 = new baseline. F1=0.302 (50 TP / 106 FN / 125 FP). Beat Run #7c (0.28) and Run #8 (0.238). Wins: throw_in 7->17 TP, corner_kick 3->5 TP, shot_on_target 15->22 TP. Regressions: catch 1->0 TP (self-inflicted), goal_kick 3->1 TP (stolen by corner_kick + ATTACK-window defaults).

notes: Run #10 - fixes Run #9 catch regression (walked back 'requires visible shot' rule; added shot-then-catch=catch tiebreaker), goal_kick stealing (corner_kick now requires visible flag/arc; goal_kick has explicit OVERRIDE priority). Raised max_candidates 220->300 (user approved compute bump). Tightened goal detection to require ball-in-net OR multi-player celebration (cut 11 FPs). Expanded triage HARD OVERRIDE with explicit bulleted list naming goal_kick under-flagging as 'THE MOST COMMON ERROR'.
